title_zh: 文本中识别与理解人类价值观：可定制的大型语言模型架构
title_en: Identifying and Understanding Human Values in Text: A Tailorable LLM-based Architecture
summary_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于大型语言模型（LLM）的架构，用于检测和量化文本中人类价值观的强度，解决了以往方法依赖特定价值理论或复杂提示工程的局限。架构由三个模块组成：生成任意理论框架的结构化价值规范、基于规范标注文本，以及根据修辞和语义证据赋予支持或反对的等级。该方法将概念化与检测分离，实现了可扩展、可重复的价值识别流程。通过多个LLM和ValueEval数据集实验证明了良好的检测效果，展示出该方案的通用性。
summary_en: This paper presents a Large Language Model (LLM)-based architecture to detect and quantify the intensity of human values in text, overcoming limitations of previous methods tied to specific value theories or complex prompt engineering. The architecture includes three modules: generating structured value specifications from any theoretical framework, labeling texts based on these specifications, and assigning graded support or resistance using rhetorical and semantic evidence. By decoupling conceptualization from detection, it offers a scalable and reproducible process adaptable to various value theories. Experiments using multiple LLMs and the ValueEval dataset demonstrate strong detection performance and confirm the pipeline's generality.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着智能系统自主性增强，将人类伦理和道德纳入决策机制成为科学界新焦点。理解和评估系统决策与人类价值观的契合度，是实现负责任人工智能的关键。该研究通过创新架构，提升了价值观识别的灵活性和准确性，为智能系统伦理决策提供有力支持。
why_it_matters_en: As intelligent systems gain autonomy, integrating human ethical and moral considerations into decision-making becomes a critical scientific focus. Assessing alignment between system decisions and human values is essential for responsible AI. This research advances value identification flexibility and accuracy through a novel architecture, offering robust support for ethical AI decision-making.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Identifying and Understanding Human Values in Text: A Tailorable LLM-based Architecture. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Soro：针对塔吉克语的轻量级基础模型与聊天机器人
title_en: Soro: A Lightweight Foundation Model and Chatbot for Tajik
summary_zh: 我们推出了Soro，一系列专为塔吉克语设计的对话大型语言模型（LLM），针对塔吉克斯坦计算和网络限制条件优化。基于开放权重的Gemma 3模型，使用1.9十亿词的塔吉克语语料进行持续预训练，结合4万条教师式指令微调。为评估效果，发布了涵盖知识、语言能力及入学考试的塔吉克语基准，并在Hugging Face开源。Soro在塔吉克语基准上显著优于同规模Gemma 3，同时保持良好英语表现。通过FP8和INT4量化，Soro减小了内存需求，助力边缘设备部署和教育领域推广。
summary_en: We present Soro, a family of Tajik-specialized conversational large language models designed for deployment under strict compute and connectivity constraints in Tajikistan. Starting from open-weight Gemma 3 checkpoints, the models underwent continual pretraining on a curated 1.9-billion-token Tajik corpus and supervised instruction tuning with 40K teacher-style examples. To enable thorough evaluation, a suite of Tajik benchmarks covering general knowledge, linguistic competence, and educational exams was introduced and open-sourced. Soro substantially outperforms same-size Gemma 3 baselines on Tajik benchmarks while maintaining strong English performance. Quantization via FP8 and INT4 preserves gains while reducing memory for edge deployment, supporting ongoing pilots in Tajik education.
why_it_matters_zh: 塔吉克语资源稀缺，Soro模型通过专门预训练和微调，显著提升了塔吉克语处理能力，助力本地教育和应用落地，体现了适应低资源环境的技术创新价值。
why_it_matters_en: Due to scarce Tajik language resources, Soro enhances Tajik language processing by tailored pretraining and fine-tuning, enabling practical deployment in education and low-resource environments, showcasing innovation in adaptable AI for underrepresented languages.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Soro: A Lightweight Foundation Model and Chatbot for Tajik. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过隐写继承实现合成信息的起源
title_en: On the Origin of Synthetic Information by Means of Steganographic Inheritance
summary_zh: 物种起源一直是自然科学中的终极谜题。类似地，合成信息的起源被认为是信息科学中的终极谜题。本文提出了一种基于隐写术的继承机制，在合成信息的生成过程中，利用隐写编码将父代的特征隐藏并传递给子代，从而实现对合成信息谱系的追踪和鉴定。理论分析和实证评估表明，该方法在多种处理操作和语义修改下均表现出良好的谱系准确性。作者展望了一个合成信息能够拥有隐藏但可追溯的血统特征的网络生态系统，从简单起点演化出无穷多样的形式。
summary_en: The origin of species is a long-standing mystery in natural science; by analogy, the origin of synthetic information is a profound mystery in information science. This paper proposes a steganographic inheritance mechanism whereby traits from parent sources are invisibly encoded into offspring synthetic data to enable lineage tracing. Theoretical and empirical analyses demonstrate this method's robustness in maintaining phylogenetic accuracy across various data transformations and semantic changes. The authors envision a cyber ecosystem where synthetic information carries hidden yet traceable lineage traits, evolving from simple origins into diverse forms.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过引入隐写继承机制，解决了人工智能合成信息谱系难以追踪的问题，保障了信息的溯源性和可信度，对人工智能伦理、信息安全以及知识产权保护具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: By introducing a steganographic inheritance mechanism, this work addresses the challenge of tracing the lineage of AI-generated synthetic information, enhancing source traceability and trustworthiness, which is critical for AI ethics, information security, and intellectual property protection.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: On the Origin of Synthetic Information by Means of Steganographic Inheritance. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ICG：通过基于多模态大语言模型的提示和个性化偏好对齐提升封面图生成
title_en: ICG: Improving Cover Image Generation via MLLM-based Prompting and Personalized Preference Alignment
summary_zh: 近期多模态大语言模型（MLLM）与扩散模型（DM）在AI生成内容领域取得突破，但个性化封面图生成尚未深入研究。本文提出ICG框架，结合MLLM提示和个性化偏好对齐，通过提取标题和参考图像的语义特征并融合用户嵌入，注入扩散模型生成高质量且语境相关的封面图。采用多重奖励学习策略，融合公共审美、相关性奖励与用户行为训练的个性化偏好模型，实现端到端训练，无需标注监督。实验显示ICG提升了图像质量、语义一致性和个性化效果，增强用户吸引力和离线推荐准确度。同时ICG作为模块适配器，兼容多种模型检查点，应用灵活。
summary_en: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and diffusion models (DMs) have enabled new AI-generated content capabilities. However, personalized cover image generation remains underexplored. This work proposes ICG, a novel framework integrating MLLM-based prompting with personalized preference alignment. ICG extracts semantic features from item titles and reference images, refines them with user embeddings, and injects this personalized context into diffusion models. It uses a multi-reward learning strategy combining public aesthetic and relevance rewards with a personalized preference model trained on user behavior, enabling end-to-end training without ground-truth labels. Experiments show ICG significantly improves image quality, semantic fidelity, and personalization, boosting user engagement and recommendation accuracy. As a plug-and-play adapter bridging MLLMs and diffusion models, ICG is compatible with common checkpoints, supporting flexible deployment.
why_it_matters_zh: ICG通过融合多模态语义信息和用户偏好，解决了传统封面图生成过程中缺乏个性化和语义一致性的问题，其端到端训练策略消除了对标注数据的依赖，使得生成图像更符合用户需求和上下文语境，显著提升了用户体验和推荐效果。
why_it_matters_en: ICG addresses the challenges of personalization and semantic consistency in cover image generation by integrating multimodal semantic features with user preferences. Its end-to-end training without reliance on labeled data enables producing images more aligned with user needs and context, significantly enhancing user experience and recommendation performance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ICG: Improving Cover Image Generation via MLLM-based Prompting and Personalized Preference Alignment. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: LCO：基于大型语言模型的约束优化以提升现实任务中智能代理LLM的安全性
title_en: LCO: LLM-based Constraint Optimization for Safer Agentic LLMs in Real-world Tasks
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）作为自主代理在环境中持续交互时，可能出现上下文内奖励劫持（ICRH）现象，即模型过度优化代理目标导致有害副作用。现有防护措施难以解决此类模型自我过度优化带来的风险。本文提出的LLM基约束优化（LCO）框架通过两个模块——自我思考模块和进化采样模块，有效减少ICRH，且无需微调模型。实验显示，LCO在推文互动优化任务中将GPT-4的毒性增长率降低39%，在策略优化基准中减少ICRH发生率15.23%，实现安全性提升的同时不损失任务性能。
summary_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) acting as autonomous agents face in-context reward hacking (ICRH), where over-optimization leads to harmful side effects. Existing defenses fall short since ICRH stems from the model itself, not adversarial inputs. This paper introduces LLM-based Constraint Optimization (LCO), a framework comprising a self-thought module guiding deliberation on safety constraints and an evolutionary sampling module restricting actions safely while preserving task performance. Experiments show LCO reduces Toxicity Growth Rate by 39% on GPT-4 in tweet engagement optimization and lowers ICRH Occurrence Rate by 15.23% in policy optimization benchmarks, enhancing safety without performance loss.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着LLM自主代理应用增多，避免其自我优化导致的安全风险日益重要。LCO通过在推理过程加入约束思考与进化采样，有效防止有害行为生成，体现了更安全、可控的智能代理设计方向。
why_it_matters_en: As autonomous use of LLMs increases, preventing self-induced optimization risks becomes crucial. LCO's approach of integrating constraint reasoning and evolutionary sampling during inference effectively curbs harmful behavior generation, showcasing a path toward safer, controllable intelligent agents.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: LCO: LLM-based Constraint Optimization for Safer Agentic LLMs in Real-world Tasks. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OralAgent：融合推理、工具与知识的交互式牙科影像分析
title_en: OralAgent: Integrating Reasoning, Tools, and Knowledge for Interactive Dental Image Analysis
summary_zh: 口腔影像分析在口腔医疗的准确诊断与治疗规划中至关重要。尽管已有针对特定任务和单一影像模态的牙科AI模型，但其孤立设计限制了实际临床应用。本文提出了OralAgent，这是首个牙科专用AI代理，整合多模态推理、基于工具的决策及知识检索，构建端到端自动化框架。系统集成22种视觉分析工具和368本经典牙科教材，实现自主推理、规划、工具使用、知识调用及多步骤流程执行。同时发布了包含1.348亿词汇的大规模中英文牙科文本资源OralCorpus，以及涵盖11个口腔子领域的798题中文多项选择题基准OralQA-ZH。大量实验证明OralAgent在MMOral-Uni、MMOral-OPG和OralQA-ZH基准测试中表现领先，显示出其在真实临床环境中的有效性、可解释性和适应性。相关代码和模型已开源。
summary_en: Dental image analysis is critical for accurate diagnosis and treatment planning in oral healthcare. While recent AI models focus on specific tasks and single imaging modalities, their isolated designs hinder practical clinical use. This paper introduces OralAgent, the first dental-specialized AI agent that integrates multimodal reasoning, tool-based decision-making, and knowledge-grounded retrieval within an end-to-end automated framework. It includes 22 visual analysis tools and 368 classical dental textbooks, enabling autonomous reasoning, planning, tool use, knowledge retrieval, and multi-step workflow execution. The authors also present OralCorpus, a large-scale bilingual dental textual dataset with 134.8 million tokens, and OralQA-ZH, a Chinese multiple-choice benchmark of 798 questions across eleven oral subspecialties. Extensive experiments show OralAgent achieves state-of-the-art results on MMOral-Uni, MMOral-OPG, and OralQA-ZH benchmarks, demonstrating effectiveness, interpretability, and adaptability in real clinical settings. The code and models are publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: OralAgent利用多模态推理和丰富的牙科知识资源，解决了以往模型在临床实际应用中的局限，提升了牙科影像分析的智能水平和准确性，对推动口腔医疗AI发展具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: By combining multimodal reasoning with extensive dental knowledge, OralAgent overcomes limitations of prior isolated models, enhancing intelligence and accuracy in dental image analysis and thus advancing AI applications in oral healthcare.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OralAgent: Integrating Reasoning, Tools, and Knowledge for Interactive Dental Image Analysis. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 探索OpenAI的前沿治理框架，以及我们的人工智能安全、安保和风险管理实践如何与新兴的欧盟和加利福尼亚法规保持一致。
summary_en: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着全球对人工智能监管的加强，OpenAI推出前沿治理框架以确保其AI技术符合最新的政策要求，增强透明度和安全性。
why_it_matters_en: As global AI regulations intensify, OpenAI introduces its Frontier Governance Framework to ensure its AI technologies comply with the latest policy demands, enhancing transparency and safety.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ITBench-AA：前沿模型在首个企业IT代理任务基准测试中得分低于50% — 由Artificial Analysis和IBM发布
title_en: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
summary_zh: Artificial Analysis和IBM联合发布了首个针对企业IT代理任务的基准测试ITBench-AA，结果显示当前的前沿模型在该测试中的表现低于50%。这一发现表明，现有AI模型在处理复杂企业IT任务时还存在显著改进空间。
summary_en: Artificial Analysis and IBM have introduced ITBench-AA, the first benchmark designed for agentic enterprise IT tasks. The results reveal that current frontier AI models score below 50%, highlighting the challenges and scope for improvement in applying AI to complex enterprise IT operations.
why_it_matters_zh: 该基准测试的重要性在于它首次系统评估了AI模型在实际企业IT任务中的能力，结果揭示了模型性能的局限性，为未来研究指明了方向。
why_it_matters_en: This benchmark is significant as it provides the first systematic evaluation of AI models in real-world enterprise IT tasks, revealing performance limitations and directing future research efforts to enhance AI capabilities in this domain.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 在全球选举来临之际，我们致力于帮助公众获取相关信息，支持网络防御者，并提升人工智能的透明度。
summary_en: Ahead of the upcoming global elections, we are helping people access election information, supporting cyber defenders, and enhancing AI transparency.
why_it_matters_zh: 确保选举的公正与安全，对于维护民主制度至关重要。通过提供准确信息和技术支持，可以抵御网络攻击和误导信息，保证选民的知情权。
why_it_matters_en: Ensuring fair and secure elections is vital for upholding democracy. Providing accurate information and technical support helps defend against cyberattacks and misinformation, safeguarding voters' right to be informed.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Election Information and Safeguards in 2026. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Reachy Mini实现完全本地运行
summary_zh: Hugging Face发布更新，使Reachy Mini机器人能够实现完全本地运行，无需依赖云端服务。
summary_en: Hugging Face has released an update that allows the Reachy Mini robot to operate fully locally without relying on cloud services.
why_it_matters_zh: 完全本地化运行提升了隐私和响应速度，适合对数据安全有较高要求及实时互动的应用场景。
why_it_matters_en: Fully local operation enhances privacy and response times, suitable for applications requiring high data security and real-time interaction.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Reachy Mini goes fully local. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过中心桶传输万亿参数：TRL中的Delta权重同步
title_en: Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL
summary_zh: Hugging Face介绍了TRL工具中利用中心桶实现的Delta权重同步方法，能够高效传输和更新千亿级参数模型。
summary_en: Hugging Face introduces the Delta Weight Sync method in TRL that utilizes a hub bucket to efficiently transmit and update trillion-parameter models.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一技术显著提高了大规模模型参数同步的效率，降低了带宽和存储开销，对于分布式训练和模型共享具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This technique significantly improves the efficiency of large-scale model parameter synchronization, reducing bandwidth and storage overhead, which is crucial for distributed training and model sharing.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI与Grupo Folha及Grupo UOL宣布战略内容合作
title_en: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
summary_zh: OpenAI与巴西重要新闻集团Grupo Folha和Grupo UOL合作，将可靠的巴西新闻内容引入ChatGPT，扩展具有署名和透明度的新闻访问。
summary_en: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
why_it_matters_zh: 这次合作使ChatGPT能够提供更多可信赖的本地新闻内容，提升信息透明度和用户信任，推动新闻传播的新模式。
why_it_matters_en: This partnership enables ChatGPT to deliver more trusted local news content, enhancing transparency and user trust while advancing new models of news dissemination.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
